if.test: dateStart != null and dateStart != '' and dateEnd != null and dateEnd != '' and dateType != null and dateType != ''

choose.when: AND i.reg_date >= #{dateStart}::DATE AND i.reg_date < (#{dateEnd}::DATE + INTERVAL '1 day')
AND i.upd_date >= #{dateStart}::DATE AND i.upd_date < (#{dateEnd}::DATE + INTERVAL '1 day')

mapper.select: SELECT /* base.ec.od :: OdClaimItem :: selectById */ i.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm , cd_cis.code_label AS claim_item_status_cd_nm FROM od_claim_item i LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = i.site_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_cis ON cd_cis.code_grp = 'CLAIM_ITEM_STATUS' AND cd_cis.code_value = i.claim_item_status_cd WHERE i.claim_item_id = #{id}

SELECT /* base.ec.od :: OdClaimItem :: selectList */ i.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm , cd_cis.code_label AS claim_item_status_cd_nm FROM od_claim_item i LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = i.site_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_cis ON cd_cis.code_grp = 'CLAIM_ITEM_STATUS' AND cd_cis.code_value = i.claim_item_status_cd
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT /* base.ec.od :: OdClaimItem :: selectPageList */ i.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm , cd_cis.code_label AS claim_item_status_cd_nm FROM od_claim_item i LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = i.site_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_cis ON cd_cis.code_grp = 'CLAIM_ITEM_STATUS' AND cd_cis.code_value = i.claim_item_status_cd
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(i.*) /* base.ec.od :: OdClaimItem :: selectPageCount */ FROM od_claim_item i
